decisions.rationale: Beyond aggregate stats, individual worker tracking is needed for orchestration. This enables querying specific worker status without parsing BUILD.md.
Double curly braces are standard for templating (Jinja2, Handlebars, etc.) and distinguishable from markdown/code syntax.

decisions.decision: meta_schema.json is a JSON Schema spec, not a template
decisions.rationale: Per brief: 'Reference schema (not a template to fill, but a spec)'. init_build.py will create meta.json instances validated against this schema.
Pre-decided titles make thread management easier. Included as frontmatter so V can copy directly.

recommendations.recommendation: Use schema_version field for forward compatibility. When reading meta.json, check schema_version and handle gracefully if newer than expected.
When creating meta.json, validate against meta_schema.json using jsonschema library. Install with: pip install jsonschema.
worker_id pattern is W{wave}.{seq} — enforce regex ^W[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$ when parsing/creating.
